'''pasholo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scaldship|scaldship]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-sh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scaldship|scaldship]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pasholo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæsheleth|pæsheleth]] || [[word:pæshelej|pæshelej]] || [[word:pæshelesh|pæshelesh]] || [[word:pæshele|pæshele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pashosholoth|pashosholoth]] || [[word:pashosholoj|pashosholoj]] || [[word:pashosholosh|pashosholosh]] || [[word:pashosholo|pashosholo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pasholoth|pasholoth]] || [[word:pasholoj|pasholoj]] || [[word:pasholosh|pasholosh]] || [[word:pasholo|pasholo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pashofloth|pashofloth]] || [[word:pashofloj|pashofloj]] || [[word:pashoflosh|pashoflosh]] || [[word:pashoflof|pashoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pasholotho|pasholotho]] || [[word:pasholojo|pasholojo]] || [[word:pasholosho|pasholosho]] || [[word:pasholoko|pasholoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pasholoth|pasholoth]] || [[word:pasholoj|pasholoj]] || [[word:pasholosh|pasholosh]] || [[word:pasholo|pasholo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pasholothol|pasholothol]] || [[word:pasholojol|pasholojol]] || [[word:pasholoshol|pasholoshol]] || [[word:pasholokol|pasholokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pasholothotho|pasholothotho]] || [[word:pasholojojo|pasholojojo]] || [[word:pasholoshosho|pasholoshosho]] || [[word:pasholoko|pasholoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pasholothon|pasholothon]] || [[word:pasholojon|pasholojon]] || [[word:pasholoshon|pasholoshon]] || [[word:pasholokon|pasholokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pasholothoro|pasholothoro]] || [[word:pasholojoro|pasholojoro]] || [[word:pasholoshoro|pasholoshoro]] || [[word:pasholokoro|pasholokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
